title: cynanchum sublanceolatum var. albidum
intro: Cynanchum sublanceolatum var. albidum, also known as white milkvine, is a plant species within the Apocynaceae family. It is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, Cynanchum sublanceolatum var. albidum is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
